function.message: I can’t complete this inbox request as written because 1 of the 5 specified files is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_03_11__eur_000029__bill__repair_ledger_filter_order.md`. I verified the other four files exist and contain OCR-able bill data, but I did not perform partial edits.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas, and avoided partial mutations when task proved not fully doable.
function.outcome_justification: Request explicitly listed five files to OCR; the fifth path was unreadable (file not found) and additional find check confirmed no such file exists in purchases. Per clarification policy, missing required input means stop and ask for clarification rather than silently completing only 4/5.
